Solar • BESS • Hybrid Development to Operations Technical + Commercial Focus
Who we help

Support tailored to the parties shaping and delivering renewable projects.

We work where projects need structured technical input, delivery discipline, operational insight, and commercially grounded advice.

D

Developers

Development-stage support across feasibility, design coordination, tender input, risk review, and project definition.

O

Asset Owners & IPPs

Independent technical and commercial support to strengthen decision-making, protect value, and improve long-term asset outcomes.

E

EPC & Delivery Teams

Practical project support across interfaces, construction oversight, technical issue resolution, and delivery coordination.

I

Investors & Stakeholders

Clear technical review, structured risk input, and commercially focused assessment across key project stages.

Our services

End-to-end support from project inception through delivery, operations, and optimisation.

Specialist support across development, technical review, construction delivery, operations, and commercial performance for solar, BESS, and hybrid renewable energy projects.

01 • Project inception & development

Renewable Energy Development

Technical and delivery support during early project stages, helping shape viable projects before they move into execution.

Feasibility Tender Support Risk Identification
  • Development-stage technical input and project definition
  • Design coordination and constructability considerations
  • Tender packaging, scope review, and delivery strategy support
  • Early identification of technical, program, and execution risks
02 • Independent review & decision support

Technical Advisory & Owner’s Engineer

Independent technical support to help clients assess options, review contractor approaches, and make stronger project decisions.

Owner-side Support Technical Review Risk Assessment
  • Independent review of scope, design, and delivery assumptions
  • Technical-commercial input during procurement and execution
  • Issue review, contractor challenge, and decision support
  • Structured assessment of project risks and obligations
03 • Delivery oversight & execution control

Renewable Energy Construction Management

Owner-side or contractor-side construction management support to improve coordination, control delivery risk, and keep projects moving.

Program Control Quality Oversight Commissioning Coordination
  • Construction oversight, reporting, and interface management
  • Program tracking, constraint identification, and delivery coordination
  • Quality surveillance, issue escalation, and close-out support
  • Support across commissioning readiness and handover activities
04 • Operational performance & asset support

O&M Advisory

Operational support focused on asset availability, maintainability, outage response, performance discipline, and practical improvement actions.

Availability Focus Maintenance Strategy Performance Improvement
  • Review of operating practices, outage trends, and maintenance approach
  • Support to improve asset performance and reduce avoidable losses
  • Maintenance strategy input and operational issue assessment
  • Structured support for asset owners and operating teams
05 • Commercial performance & value protection

Revenue Optimisation

Commercial and operational analysis to identify missed value, revenue leakage, underperformance, and practical opportunities to improve realised outcomes.

Loss Identification Commercial Insight Actionable Improvement
  • Review of performance, curtailment, and operational loss drivers
  • Identification of avoidable value leakage and weak operating logic
  • Commercial framing of technical issues and operational decisions
  • Practical recommendations to improve realised project value
06 • Flexible engagement model

Project-Specific Advisory Support

Targeted support for clients who need experienced input on a specific challenge, package, stage gate, technical issue, or delivery pressure point.

Short-Term Support Issue Resolution Execution Focus
  • Focused support for high-priority project issues
  • Supplementary technical and delivery bandwidth when needed
  • Independent review of specific workstreams or packages
  • Flexible engagement aligned to project stage and urgency
Project lifecycle support

One advisory partner across the stages where value is created, protected, and improved.

Our services are structured to support projects in sequence, from early definition through to operations and commercial performance improvement.

1

Development

  • Feasibility input
  • Project definition
  • Risk identification
2

Technical Review

  • Scope and design review
  • Owner-side advice
  • Decision support
3

Construction

  • Program oversight
  • Interface management
  • Delivery coordination
4

Commissioning & Handover

  • Readiness support
  • Issue close-out
  • Transition to operations
5

Operations & Optimisation

  • O&M advisory
  • Performance improvement
  • Revenue optimisation
Why Sequence Engineering

Grounded support that connects engineering, delivery, and commercial outcomes.

We do not treat projects as isolated technical exercises. We focus on how decisions made in development, delivery, and operations affect execution risk, asset performance, and realised project value.

How we add value

  • Bring lifecycle thinking from project inception through operations
  • Combine technical review with practical delivery awareness
  • Support clearer decisions on scope, risk, interfaces, and execution
  • Strengthen construction oversight, issue management, and handover discipline
  • Help owners and operators identify avoidable operational and commercial losses
  • Provide flexible support matched to project stage, challenge, and urgency
Development to delivery

Structured project support

Useful where a project needs more than narrow technical advice and instead requires coordinated support across scope, risk, delivery planning, and execution readiness.

Operations to value

Practical optimisation focus

Useful where operational and commercial performance need to be reviewed together so that issues are translated into clear improvement actions rather than generic reporting.

Capability statement

Need something you can circulate internally?

We can provide a capability statement covering services, project-stage support, and how Sequence Engineering can assist your development, delivery, operational, or optimisation requirements.
